title: taenitis dimorpha
intro: Taenitis dimorpha, also known as the New Zealand fern or silver fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The plant's health benefits include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve liver function, and act as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, Taenitis dimorpha is often used as a tea or tincture, and is also incorporated into topical creams and ointments for its anti-inflammatory and skin-soothing properties.
